description_long: This is a compact, rectangular shelving unit constructed from dark wood or wood-like material, featuring a simple and modern design. The structure consists of four straight legs supporting three flat, evenly spaced shelves, providing ample open storage space. The top surface is flat and can be used to display or hold additional items, while the two lower shelves are open on all sides for easy access. The finish is a deep, almost black brown, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or apartment entryways. There are no visible doors, drawers, or handles, emphasizing its minimalist and functional style. The overall build appears sturdy, with clean lines and a smooth surface.
description: A dark wood, three-tier open shelving unit with a minimalist, modern design and smooth surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and four straight legs, with all shelves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view, similar to the front, but the shelf supports are more prominent and the open design is consistent.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the legs, with all three shelves visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 2, showing the same shelf and leg arrangement.
